rationale: Educ. Code §43.006 governs delegation of investment authority for the Permanent School Fund. It has no operative relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The State Board of Education may delegate investment authority for the investment of the permanent school fund to the Texas Permanent School Fund Corporation as provided by Subchapter B.
_note: No conflict; cited statute concerns PSF investment management, not property tax exemptions.
